sections.title: Using the Sober-Up option on Skippy without a bucket of water

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, I could shock him out of it if I could find some cold water...

sections.title: Using a bucket of water on Skippy to sober him up
Talking to him before obtaining nettle tea

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Skippy!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Gaah! Don't drench me again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! I only did that once! Try not to be such a big baby!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: So what are you here for then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No real reason. I just thought I would check up on you is all.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Well, I'm still wet, still cold and still waiting on that nettle tea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I could dump this bucket of water over him. That would sober him up a little...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll leave it for now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Skippy!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhhhhgh! That's cold! Are you trying to kill me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, just sober you up. Memory coming back yet?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: No. But I could do with a bowl of tea to warm myself up a bit. Go grab me one and we'll talk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any particular type of tea?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Nettle for preference. Just make sure it's hot.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: And don't throw it at me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's your problem? You're all clean now.

sections.title: Talking to him before obtaining hangover cure

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Skippy!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Egad! Don't you know not to shout around a guy with a hangover?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Ahhhhhg...No more shouting for me...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: What is it anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just came back to ask you something.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I make that hangover cure again?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Give me strength...Here's what you do. Pay attention!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: You take a bucket of milk, a bar of chocolate and some snape grass.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Grind the chocolate with a pestle and mortar.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Add the chocolate powder to the milk, then add the snape grass.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Then bring it here and I will drink it.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Are you likely to remember that or should I go get some crayons and draw you a picture?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! I remember it now, ok! See you in a bit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do they call you Skippy?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I think it may have something to do with my near- constant raving about mudskippers.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: That or it's something to do with that time with the dress and the field full of daisies...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Skippy!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Gaah! Don't drench me again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! I only did that once! Try not to be such a big baby!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: So what are you here for then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come to give you your tea.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Excellent! I was thinking I was going to freeze out here!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Ohhhhh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Not so loud...I think I have a hangover...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great...Well, I doubt you can remember anything through a hangover. What a waste of nettle tea...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Hey! A little sympathy here?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Owwowwoww... must remember not to shout...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Look, I do know a hangover cure. If you can get me a bucket of the stuff I think I'll be ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait... is this cure a bucket of chocolate milk and snape grass?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Yes! That's the stuff!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ahhh. Yes, I've made some of that stuff before. I should be able to get you some, no problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what is it you need?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: A bucket of milk with chocolate ground into it, with a handful of snape grass thrown in on top.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Run that past me again?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Take a bucket of milk, a bar of chocolate and some snape grass.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Grind the chocolate with a mortar and pestle.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Add the chocolate powder to the milk, then add the snape grass.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Then bring it here and I will drink it.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: The end, and we all live happily ever after. Got it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Skippy!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Egad! Don't you know not to shout around a guy with a hangover?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Ahhhhhg...No more shouting for me...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: What is it anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well Skippy, you will no doubt be glad to hear that I got you your hangover cure!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Gimme!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhhhhhhhhh...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Much better...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Feeling better?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Considerably.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then tell me where the mudskippers are!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I wish you wouldn't go looking for them. Those vicious killers will tear you apart.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: It's all becoming clear to me now...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I was fishing using a Fishing Explosive...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A Fishing Explosive?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Well, Slayer Masters sell these highly volatile potions for killing underwater creatures.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: If you don't feel like lobbing a net about all day you can use them to fish with...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: But this time I was startled by what I thought was a giant mudskipper.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: What it was, infact, was a...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Dramatic Pause...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: A Mogre!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What exactly is a Mogre?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: A Mogre is a type of Ogre that spends most of its time underwater.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: They hunt giant mudskippers by wearing their skins and swimming close until they can attack them.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: When I used the Fishing Explosive I scared off all the fish, and so the Mogre got out of the water to express its extreme displeasure.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: With an iron mace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take it the head injury is responsible for the staggering and yelling?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: No, no.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: My addiction to almost-lethal alcohol did that.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: But if you are set on finding these Mogres just head south from here until you find Mudskipper Point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The mudskipper-eating monsters are to be found at Mudskipper point?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shock!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. I'll be careful.
